title: Logic, Sets, Counting, and Decision Rules
description: Audit eligibility rules and resource allocation without double-counting people or contradicting policy. Learners cumulatively produce a tested eligibility and allocation rule set through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Represent categories, subsets, unions, intersections, and complements from precise definitions.
Use Venn diagrams and inclusion-exclusion to count overlapping groups exactly once.
Distinguish statements, predicates, quantifiers, negation, converse, inverse, and contrapositive.
